title: クライマックス3戦目の後に

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I'm very sorry! I spaced out for a second
there...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Um... That was a remarkable race! Truly
breathtaking!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It's a bizarre feeling... I know the race is over, but
it's like... I want to see the rest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
But now it's settled. We know who the greatest
is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a little while, Reporter Otonashi gazes
vacantly at the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The greatest has actually been decided... The
reality of the situation is slowly starting to sink in!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
...That was a fantastic race. Everyone truly gave it
their all.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
As someone who has supported the two of you all
this time, I feel... frustrated? ...Saddened?

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: But... We now know who the greatest is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi gazes vacantly at the track.
Her mind seems to be elsewhere, but I need to go
check on how my partner is doing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of "greatest" has been decided. But our
journey is still far from over!
